/usr/bin/ar qc liblevio.a CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_math.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_se3.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_ringbuf.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_camera.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_orb.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_match.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_ransac_8pt.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_pnp_epnp.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_triangulate.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_frontend.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_imu_preint.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_factors.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio_backend.c.o CMakeFiles/levio.dir/src/levio.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblevio.a
